scene_description: Indoor ceiling with hanging lights and pipes
expected_depth_behavior: Nearby lamps and pipes should be predicted closer than the back wall and ceiling structures

secondary_tags: transparent object, very close object, plain wall
scene_description: Hand holding a transparent glass in front of a plain wall
expected_depth_behavior: The hand and glass should be closer than the wall; the transparent glass may be ambiguous

scene_description: Transparent glass on a table with chair and wall behind it
expected_depth_behavior: The glass and table should be closer than the chair and wall; transparent boundaries may be weak

scene_description: Mostly plain wall and corner with minimal texture
expected_depth_behavior: Depth may be over-smoothed because the wall has few visual cues

scene_description: Large plain wall with visible side room and study area
expected_depth_behavior: The near wall should be separated from the deeper side room; textureless regions may be uncertain

scene_description: Wide indoor kitchen scene with counters, lamps, and background tables
expected_depth_behavior: Foreground counter should be closer than background tables and walls

scene_description: Kitchen counter with reflective metal surface and glass in foreground
expected_depth_behavior: Reflective counter may confuse depth cues; foreground glass should be closer than background

scene_description: Close transparent glass on reflective metal table with distant background
expected_depth_behavior: The close glass should dominate the near-depth prediction; transparency and reflection may cause errors

scene_description: Reflective metal table with small glass and kitchen background
expected_depth_behavior: Reflections may create false depth cues; small glass should be near

scene_description: Outdoor street scene with cars, trees, sidewalk, and buildings
expected_depth_behavior: Nearby trees and cars should be closer than distant buildings and sidewalk end

scene_description: Bathroom mirror selfie with tiled background
expected_depth_behavior: The physical mirror plane is close, but reflected person and background may be interpreted as real 3D space

scene_description: Very close hand-held object inside car with distant outdoor scene
expected_depth_behavior: The hand and object should be much closer than the road, building, and sky outside

scene_description: Cafe drinks in foreground with outdoor street and buildings behind
expected_depth_behavior: Foreground drinks should be closer than street and buildings; blurred background may reduce depth detail

scene_description: Person in front of transparent glass balcony with distant city view
expected_depth_behavior: Person and balcony structure should be closer than city background; glass plane may be ambiguous

scene_description: Cup and reflective vase near a window with blurred street background
